mapper.sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TB_SLA_IGNORE_DATEID , VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(IGNORE_DATE ,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY/MM/DD') AS IGNORE_DATE , USE_YN , REMARK , REG_USER_ID , REG_DT FROM TB_SLA_IGNORE_DATE )

WHERE 1=1
AND VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(IGNORE_DATE ,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMM') = REPLACE(#{INPUT_DATE}, '/', '')
AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IGNORE_DATE ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_SLA_IGNORE_DATE WHERE VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(IGNORE_DATE ,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMM') = REPLACE(#{INPUT_DATE}, '/', '')
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TB_SLA_IGNORE_DATE A USING (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*),0) COUNT FROM TB_SLA_IGNORE_DATE WHERE VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(IGNORE_DATE ,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{IGNORE_DATE}) B ON B.COUNT > 0 AND VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(A.IGNORE_DATE ,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY/MM/DD') = #{IGNORE_DATE} WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET UPD_USER_ID = #{UPD_USER_ID} , UPD_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TB_SLA_IGNORE_DATEID , IGNORE_DATE , USE_YN , REG_USER_ID , REG_DT ) VALUES ( NEXTVAL FOR TB_SLA_IGNORE_DATEIDSEQ , VARCHAR_FORMAT(TO_DATE(#{IGNORE_DATE} ,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'YYYYMMDD') , #{USE_YN} , #{REG_USER_ID} , CURRENT TIMESTAMP )
